narrative:
Union Township R (precinct in Clermont County) has 823 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.6 percentage points.
